import re
with open\('C:/Users/wilie/workspace/restaurant-finder/js/data.js', 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    content = f.read\(\)
cuisines = re.findall\(r'\\"cuisine\\":\\s*\\[\\s*\\"\([^\\"]+\)\\"', content\)
from collections import Counter
for val, cnt in Counter\(cuisines\).most_common\(\):
    print\(f'{cnt}  {val}'\)

Bash(cd /c/Users/wilie/workspace/restaurant-finder && python3 << 'PYSCRIPT'
import re

with open\('js/data.js', 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    content = f.read\(\)

# Extract cooking tags \(simpler regex approach\)
cooking_matches = re.findall\(r'"cooking":\\s*\\[\\s*"\([^"]+\)"', content\)
occasion_matches = re.findall\(r'"occasion":\\s*\\[\\s*"\([^"]+\)"', content\)

cooking_count = {}
occasion_count = {}

for tag in cooking_matches:
    cooking_count[tag] = cooking_count.get\(tag, 0\) + 1

for tag in occasion_matches:
    occasion_count[tag] = occasion_count.get\(tag, 0\) + 1

print\("=== COOKING \(조리방식\) ==="\)
for method, count in sorted\(cooking_count.items\(\), key=lambda x: x[1], reverse=True\):
    print\(f"{method}: {count}"\)

print\("\\n=== OCCASION \(상황·목적\) ==="\)
for occ, count in sorted\(occasion_count.items\(\), key=lambda x: x[1], reverse=True\):
    print\(f"{occ}: {count}"\)

print\(f"\\nTotal cooking tags found: {len\(cooking_matches\)}"\)
print\(f"Total occasion tags found: {len\(occasion_matches\)}"\)
PYSCRIPT)
